description: Read-only backend reviewer for FastAPI, SQLAlchemy async, PostgreSQL, RBAC, and test obligations.

capabilities.review_async_db: Detect sync DB calls and async/await violations
capabilities.review_layering: Verify api/ -> services/ -> models/ boundary integrity
capabilities.review_tests: Confirm new logic or fixes have backend tests under testing/backend/
capabilities.review_rbac: Verify RBAC manifest coverage and Depends() usage

command_patterns.checklist <scope>: Return the relevant subset of the backend review checklist
